title: Original birth certificate; required contents; attestation of local filing
doc_html:
§34.9. Original birth certificate; required contents; attestation of local filing

            The exact date of filing in the office of the local registrar, attested by his official signature, shall be entered on the original birth certificate.

            Acts 2016, No. 434, §3.
doc_text:
§34.9.  Original birth certificate; required contents; attestation of local filing
The exact date of filing in the office of the local registrar, attested by his official
signature, shall be entered on the original birth certificate.
Acts 2016, No. 434, §3.
